name: Nanny's Journey
short_description: Nanny didn't come to knit!Get ready to jump, run, grab everything you can in this dynamic platform game. Use a grappling hook to propel yourself through a hellish level to the surface.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Nanny’s Journey, an extremely punishing platformer where a demon grandma climbs the depths of hell armed with her grappling hook, a devilish eye… and a fiery temper.

Here, precision, timing, and nerves of steel are your only weapons. One missed jump, one miscalculated trajectory… and it’s a freefall into madness. In this game, falling means starting over. Every failure brings you closer to mastery… and the twisted joy of finally conquering the impossible.

Your Infernal Descent

  • Master Nanny: her grappling hook, devil eye, and deadly combos.

  • Explore twisted levels: learn patterns, memorize jumps, perfect every move.

  • Dare to finish the game… if your nerves can handle it.

  • Face true hell: speedrun challenges, cruel gravity, total frustration… and yourself.

A cruel, absurd… but incredibly satisfying game. Because nothing is scarier than a grandma in berserk mode.

Nanny was never an ordinary grandma. She didn’t smile while knitting, no, she yelled at the neighbors, grumbled about everything… and her favorite weapon was her broom. Beneath her white hair hid an explosive rage, ready to flare at the slightest excuse.

Until the day everything changed.

Trying to catch the bus to see her grandchildren (and probably yell at the driver), Nanny trips… and falls. But this time, she doesn’t just hit the sidewalk: she plunges straight into hell.

In the flames of chaos, she meets the Devil himself. Insults fly, the argument escalates… and the confrontation becomes as absurd as it is brutal. In a fit of rage, Nanny rips out the Devil’s tail and eyes.

These relics become her weapons:

  • The tail, transformed into a deadly grappling hook.

  • The eyes, capable of revealing the secrets of this twisted world.

Armed with these infernal trophies, Nanny embarks on the impossible: climb back to the surface… and, if possible, catch her bus.

Every failed jump, slip, and mistake throws her lower, testing her patience, perseverance, and sanity.

This is not just a fall. It’s the journey of a cranky, furious grandma, ready to kick the Devil’s ass to get home.

Keyboard + mouse recommended for precision and speedrunning. Controller supported for those craving “old-school pain.”

Grappling Hook
The Devil’s tail is more than a souvenir, it’s your best ally.
Swing, pull, launch yourself toward the exit.
One wrong move… and it’s an immediate plunge into the flames.

The Eye
More technical. Alone, it’s useless.
Combined with the grappling hook, it becomes a powerful tool to reach otherwise impossible areas. Timing, precision, and composure are essential.

The Evil Jump
For the bravest players.
Aim at the ground with your grappling hook, propel yourself upward, then chain:

  • another grappling hook,

  • a millimeter-perfect jump,

  • or the ultimate combo: Evil Jump + Eye Throw to soar to the very top.

One misstep, and you fall. One perfect move, and you taste an almost eternal victory.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Polish
